allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update all reference docs to implement user''s modified vision \(V44-V47\)

CRITICAL CHANGES:
- V30 spec now inherits from V44-V47 vision, NOT reference photo
- Added USER_VISION_ELEMENTS.md as definitive vision reference
- Updated master_specification_template.md with vision section
- Updated QUICK_REFERENCE.md with vision checklist

USER''S VISION ELEMENTS \(LOCKED\):
- Clock-style gear system \(NO BELTS\) - all gears mesh directly
- Gear support plate \(skeleton with bearing holes\)
- Four-bar linkage wave mechanism \(5 layers, 30° phase offset\)
- Rice tube mechanism \(functional L/R tilt\)
- Bird wire carrier system \(NOT decorative flock\)
- Animation speeds: Moon VERY SLOW \(0.1x\), Lighthouse SLOW \(0.3x\)
- Zone changes: Bottom gears moved to LEFT, specific bird wire Y range

This commit ensures all future versions properly implement the user''s
creative modifications rather than copying the Van Gogh reference photo.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(ls -la "D:\\Claude local\\3d_design_agent\\components\\wrappers"" 2>/dev/null || echo "Checking Reference folder..." && ls -la "D:Claude local3d_design_agentReference ")
Bash(cmd.exe /c "where node 2>nul & where npm 2>nul & where npx 2>nul")
Bash(cmd /c "for /f ""tokens=5"" %a in \(''netstat -ano ^| findstr :3001 ^| findstr LISTENING''\) do taskkill /F /PID %a")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PSEOF'
$conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
foreach \($c in $conns\) {
    $pid = $c.OwningProcess
    Write-Host "Killing PID $pid on port 3001"
    Stop-Process -Id $pid -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
}
Write-Host "Port 3001 cleared"
PSEOF)
